messages.content:
# Liquidity

## Average Quarterly Liquidity Coverage Ratio ("LCR")

- 3Q23: 155%
- 4Q23: 167%
- 1Q24: 164%
- 2Q24: 155%
- 3Q24: 163%

_Liquidity coverage ratio_

## Total Liquidity Reserves ($M)

- 4Q19: $90,557
- 3Q23: $118,352
- 4Q23: $120,652
- 1Q24: $127,481
- 2Q24: $122,914
- 3Q24: $131,622

↑ 7% Q/Q  
↑ 11% Y/Y

- FHLB eligible loans
- Investment securities
- Cash and cash equivalents

## Third Quarter 2024 Highlights

- Average quarterly Liquidity Coverage Ratio of 163%
- Total liquidity reserves of $131.6 billion as of September 30, 2024
  - $49.3 billion in cash and cash equivalents

Note: The Q3'24 LCR is preliminary and therefore subject to change.  
(1) Amount above represents unencumbered liquidity reserves. Securities pledged and eligible to secure FHLB borrowing capacity are presented within investment securities above.

liquidityReservesMillions.description: Total liquidity reserves in millions of USD for the period

totalLiquidityReserves.description: Total liquidity reserves in millions of USD for each reporting period

lcrPercent.description: Decimal representation of the LCR percentage (e.g., 1.55 for 155%)

liquidityCoverageRatios.description: Average quarterly LCR (Liquidity Coverage Ratio) over time
